checks.name: Codex skill structure
checks.details: quick_validate.py reported both skills valid: skills/audio-to-score and skills/audio-chord-recognition.

checks.name: Audio-to-score contract validation
checks.details: Ten Python unit tests passed, covering valid source and generated layers plus form approval, reviewer identity, section range, melody overlap, lyric structure, form-coordinate, provenance, and written mapping failures.

checks.name: Form-aware chord validation
checks.details: Five Python unit tests passed for backward-compatible standalone analysis, approved-form module mode, form-coordinate enforcement, and generated-harmony rejection.

checks.name: Skill synchronization safety
checks.details: Three Node tests passed for exact one-skill install, receipt/hash checks, read-only clean check, drift detection, repair, unrelated-skill preservation, and invalid-target rejection.

checks.name: Installed skill drift
checks.details: audio-to-score and audio-chord-recognition both reported clean with matching repository, installed, and receipt hashes after refinement.

checks.name: Lint
checks.details: npm run lint completed with zero errors. Eight pre-existing unused-symbol warnings remain in unrelated source files.

checks.name: Production build
checks.details: npm run build compiled, typechecked, generated static routes, and completed successfully after refinement.

checks.name: Diff hygiene
checks.details: git diff --check completed without whitespace errors.

visual_checks.name: Rendered UI verification
visual_checks.details: No rendered website, TSX, CSS, songs data, or visual surface changed.
